recommendations.title: Depression and Friends
recommendations.overview: When Frank is diagnosed with depression, his friends try to cheer him up -- and it quickly becomes clear that they're just as down and out as he is.

recommendations.title: Ibiza
recommendations.overview: A mature podiatrist, his girlfriend and her teenage children travel Ibiza to live a crazy holidays.

recommendations.title: Not Without My Shrink
recommendations.overview: A successful psychoanalyst's life is turned upside down by a very anxious and extremely clingy patient who starts dating his daughter.

recommendations.title: Bis

recommendations.title: Room(h)ates
recommendations.overview: Delphine and Yvan divorce. While his financial situation does not allow him to find a home, Yvan remembers that he owns 20% of his ex-wife's house. He then returned to live with Delphine, in his 20%. The two ex will discover the joys of forced housem

recommendations.title: Vincent
recommendations.overview: Young Vincent Malloy dreams of being just like Vincent Price and loses himself in macabre daydreams that annoy his mother.

recommendations.title: (Girl)Friend
recommendations.overview: Vincent and Nefeli just moved in together. They're best friends and swore to never fall in love again. That is until Vincent meets Julie.

recommendations.title: The Marquis

recommendations.title: With a Friend Like Harry...
recommendations.overview: While fixing up their summer cottage, Michel and his family run into a man who claims to have gone to high school with Michel.

recommendations.title: The Sweet Escape
recommendations.overview: Michel, a fifty year old man, graphic designer, decides to change the urban lifestyle and go on an adventure. Fascinated by airmail, he dreams at Jean Mermoz when he's on scooter. One day, Michel sees a picture of a kayak.
